notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, first baseman Pete Alonso to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Junior Caminero out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios steals (7) 2nd base. Ryan Vilade steals (2) home.
